title: penstemon tenuis
intro: Penstemon tenuis, also known as slender beardtongue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Penstemon tenuis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Penstemon tenuis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a tincture or salve for topical application.
